audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass uses a discount code. You will receive the discount code via email after booking this pass. Purchasing tickets in advance is recommended. See confirmation email for instructions. Pass admits two adults at $12 per person. Includes admission to the Yin Yu Tang, the Chines

coupon.source_phrase_block: This pass uses a discount code. You will receive the discount code via email after booking this pass. Purchasing tickets in advance is recommended. See confirmation email for instructions. Pass admits two adults at $12 per person. Includes admission to the Yin Yu Tang, the Chinese house. Access to special ticketed exhibitions also require a separate fee. Visitors using a library pass are not entitled to any other member benefits.
